mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, business_type, file_name, file_url, result_url, process_status, process_message, ext_field,create_time, creator_id, creator, update_time, updator_id, updator, deleted
mapper.insert: insert into file_import_record (id, tenant_id, business_type, file_name, file_url, result_url, process_status, process_message, ext_field,create_time, creator_id, creator, update_time, updator_id, updator, deleted, ext_info) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{businessType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resultUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extField},#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{extInfo,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into file_import_record
id,
tenant_id,
business_type,
file_name,
file_url,
result_url,
process_status,
process_message,
ext_field,
create_time,
creator_id,
creator,
update_time,
updator_id,
updator,
deleted,
ext_info,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{businessType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{fileUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{resultUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{processStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{processMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{extField,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
#{extInfo,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update file_import_record
result_url = #{resultUrl},
process_status = #{processStatus},
process_message = #{processMessage},
ext_field = #{extField},
ext_info = #{extInfo},
update_time = #{updateTime},
updator_id = #{updatorId},
updator = #{updator},
where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.select:
select
from file_import_record where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
